programme.title: A Kid in King Arthur's Court

programme.title: Jumper

programme.title: Big Momma's House

programme.title: National Lampoon's Gold Diggers
programme.desc: A pair of losers marry two elderly sisters, thinking they'll inherit their fortune and Beverly Hills estate.

programme.title: Made In America

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: The 39 Steps
programme.desc: A man in London tries to help a counter-espionage Agent. But when the Agent is killed, and the man stands accused, he must go on the run to save himself and stop a spy ring that is trying to steal top-secret information.

programme.title: The Plague Dogs

programme.title: The Hero
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in – and co-directs – this powerful story of an aging soccer player whose life is crumbling. All he has left is a devoted 12-year old fan – and a desire to live free.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: Evel Knievel
programme.desc: Biography of the famed motorcycle daredevil, much of which was filmed in his home town of Butte, Montana. The film depicts Knievel reflecting on major events in his life just before a big jump.

programme.title: Kung Fu Gold
programme.desc: A gold miner returns to his hometown to arrange marriages for his fellow miners. He discovers that his own sweetheart was murdered by a corrupt army officer, and he teams up with a rebel fighter to defeat him. (1974)

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.title: Family Games
programme.desc: Sloane and her boyfriend Barrett return to her childhood home determined to ruin her father Roan's re-marriage. Family secrets surface and give rise to a puzzling future.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Freddie has everything--a gorgeous new husband and half ownership of a winery. But when her business partner's wife is murdered, Freddi suspects her partner's new love.

programme.title: Taking Earth
programme.desc: The human race is thrown into chaos when an alien invasion takes place. But the aliens have arrived for a very specific reason - to find the one boy out of 7 billion people who holds the power to destroy them.

programme.title: Drone DR1 (AKA Rotor DR1)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world where half the population is dead or missing and the sky is full of autonomous drones, a 16-year-old boy named Kitch sets out to find his father, joined by DR1, his drone companion.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended

programme.title: Storm Boy
programme.desc: When Michael Kingley, a successful retired businessman starts to see images from his past that he can't explain, he's forced to remember his childhood and how, as a boy, he rescued and raised an extraordinary orphaned pelican, Mr Percival.

programme.title: The Adventurer: Curse of the Midas Box

programme.title: Bogus

programme.desc: Linda is hoping for love when she meets Jim, but his charm lasts only as long as he doesn't drink. Unable to stay sober, Jim becomes determined to keep Linda all to himself...even if it kills her.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: Deborah finds herself in a fairytale romance with bad boy Steven. But after they marry, Deborah becomes a subject to daily abuse. When she leaves him, Steven stops at nothing to get revenge.

programme.desc: When Tom Donato's wife Kristin turns controlling, he vows to get a divorce. But Kristin exacts a terrible price for revenge and frames him as a dangerous stalker.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Signed, Your Deadliest Fan
programme.desc: A successful comic book author and illustrator encounters a fan who wants far more than an autograph.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Love is a Battlefield

programme.title: Andromeda: Into the Labyrinth

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan and his new Commonwealth fleet take on the Drago-Kazov fleet but find it much larger than expected.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Magog eggs in Harper are starting to hatch, so the team builds a Teseract machine.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan takes over a tourist barge in an attempt to escape mercenaries.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Theft is on everyone’s mind and the women on Drover’s Run have their own style of justice.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: When CLAIRE attends a seminar she leaves TESS in charge of Drovers Run and on her return she discovers a lot more can happen in twenty four hours than she would ever have imagined or, at least, would have led TESS to believe.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: Pushed by a neighbour’s untimely death Harry works too hard and is found trapped under a tractor. Fearing the end Harry continues to play one son off against the other and Tess learns a shocking secret from Liz.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters
programme.desc: A celebratory night out almost ends in disaster when a plan to stop Brian’s misdeeds backfires.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: More Than One Way …
programme.desc: Claire is about to achieve her dream, and wants Tess to have hers - that little cafe in Brunswick she used to talk about.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: The Italian Stallion
programme.desc: When Alberto, a good looking itinerant Italian, rescues Jodi from a rampant steer she falls hopelessly in love with him.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: In his role as State Vet, Danny works with wealthy conservationist, Anton Ziegler, to catch a group of leopard hunters. Ziegler is also buying a tiger from Vanessa, who struggling with her finances, desperately needs the money to ensure Mara's future.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family are making arrangements to leave Leopard's Den, all except Du Plessis who is steadfastly refusing to accept that he has lost his home. He won't use his share of the money from the sale of the land to buy somewhere else.

programme.title: On the Case: Justice Never Quits
programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: 22 Hours of Terror
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl is kidnapped during a home invasion, and police frantically search for her and her abductor. Paula Zahn explores the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Shadow of Suspicion
programme.desc: A young woman travels to California in pursuit of a Hollywood dream and winds up the victim of a savage homicide.

programme.title: On the Case: Race To Judgment
programme.desc: A late-night crash claims the lives of four girls. Texas community is torn apart in the search for justice.

programme.title: On the Case: Terrifying Connections
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old boy vanished under mysterious circumstances police feared the worst. It appeared the case had terrifying connections to a serial killer who had left a trail of bloodshed across the region.

programme.title: On the Case: Web of Torment
programme.desc: The abduction of a young mother from a crowded hospital parking lot is the beginning of a terrifying mystery that will torment her loved ones for decades.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: An energy barrier threatens to consume everything in its path as the Sliders rush to prevent Mallory (Robert Floyd) from being transformed into their nemesis, Dr. Geiger (guest star Peter Jurasik).

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 1.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders' first jump lands them in an ice-aged San Francisco and then onto an Earth where Wade's (Sabrina Lloyd) ally is the head of a rebel group. Part 2.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders race to find the cure for a deadly plague that is consuming the inhabitants of that dimension. Guest stars: Yee Jee Tso, James Bell. With Jerry O'Connell and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The sliders must find a solution amid the chaos when they land on an Earth in jeopardy of being destroyed by a meteor. Guest stars Gerry Narin and Jason Gaffney. With Sabrina Lloyd.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Wade and Rembrandt (Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks) are treated as gods when the Sliders land on an Earth where free love and thinking still exists. Guest star: Jason Gaffney.

programme.title: Moesha: Keepin’ It Real
programme.desc: Mo is attracted to a classmate she is working with on a project.

programme.title: Moesha: Halloween Part 1 – Kim’s Revenge
programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy decide to dress as “The Women of Batman” for Halloween.

programme.title: Moesha: Break It Down
programme.desc: Frank takes Hakeem to the father/son “lock-in” at the local church, to encourage open communication and trust between fathers and sons.

programme.title: Moesha: Rhythm Dues
programme.desc: Mo encourages CPQ to submit their latest song to the local radio station for their “play it or stuff it” segment. When the song is played, it is well received. Q has written lyrics over a Morris Day song, and Morris shows up at “The Hole” where he plays.

programme.title: Moesha: The Double Date
programme.desc: Mo has been dating Bridgewood classmate Jeremy since her break up with Q.

programme.title: Moesha: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother
programme.desc: Mo gets a crush on Dee’s very attractive younger brother when he comes to visit.

programme.title: Moesha: It’s My Paper And I’ll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: Mo decides to publish her own Bridgewood newspaper when editor Mary Ellen refuses to add her to the staff of the existing paper.

programme.title: Moesha: The “Short” Story
programme.desc: Mo’s group at the Den includes a short kid known as “Biggie”.

programme.title: Moesha: She’s Back
programme.desc: A famous female broadcast journalist who used to be friends with Frank speaks at Bridgewood, so Mo invites her to their house for dinner.

programme.title: Moesha: This Time You’ve Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Mo, Kim, Hakeem, Niecy, Morgan, Marco, and Chris head off on a road trip to San Diego.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lemon Squeeze Episode
programme.desc: Gigi uses an adequate exercise when the family refuses to stop fighting with each other.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Mother's-in-Law Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne's overprotective mother arrives and causes tension between her and Nick when she questions Nick's abilities as a husband.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Tit for Tat Episode
programme.desc: A newly hired, attractive woman threatens Nick's job at the station.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Quarantine Episode
programme.desc: When Marilyn brings a dangerous flu back from a trip to Mexico, the family must stay inside their house under quarantine.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The V.I.P. Tickets Episode
programme.desc: Nick angers Suzanne when he invites Martin to an exclusive sporting event before inviting his wife.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lindsey Dances Episode
programme.desc: Lindsey auditions to dance for a famous rapper's music video, but she later backs out after meeting with the powerful, demanding choreographer.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Career Day Episode
programme.desc: For Career Day, Nick serves as a guest speaker for Kevin's class, but his message ultimately confuses Kevin's classmates.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The House Sitter's Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne's next door's neighbors become irresponsible house sitters.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains. Taken to hospital, the couple die several days apart. The food poisoning theory is quickly ruled out and forensic tests show the Labrells were poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Evelyne Boucher Case
programme.desc: On December 9th 1987, the naked body of the young Evelyne Boucher is found near Avignon. An unprecedented investigation begins making headlines.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Scorpion: Toby Or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must out-think their unstable ex-Scorpion member after he kidnaps Toby and threatens to kill him unless his cunning demands are met.

programme.title: Scorpion: Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must put aside their personal and romantic predicaments when anonymous hackers with unknown motives take control of U.S. military aircraft and warships and point weapons at American cities.

programme.title: Scorpion: And More Civil War
programme.desc: Just as Team Scorpion makes headway against the hackers controlling U.S. naval destroyers, they learn that a U.S. nuclear submarine also has been hacked and has a missile about to launch.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Irish Crown Affair
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Dublin, Ireland in search of the missing crown of the last King of Ireland.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Vanishing Art
programme.desc: Accompanying Max the magician, Sydney and Nigel journey to Atlantic City, New Jersey in search of Hungary's lost and allegedly cursed Royal Scepter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Love Letter
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to France to look for the lost wedding vows of Josephine Pontoise and Guy de Bourdin, which would prove their heir is the rightful owner of St. Agnes Sur-Loire.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: A Good Year
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to France to find the lost stones from Marie Antoinette's Crown.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Nothing But the Truth
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are reunited with Stewie Harper in the search for the Chalice of Truth in France.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Jammy old Jason Manford and Ed Byrne get to have a laugh and attempt some worldies on FIFA. Dara O Briain's brilliant retro game show also features Asteroids and Kororinpa.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Richard Osman and Sara Pascoe compete in a series of games including `Galaga' and `Micro Machines'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara and the team captains are joined by Rob Beckett and Zoe Lyons. Over the course of five rounds, the two teams do battle on games including `Gran Turismo', `Horace Goes Skiing' and `Goat Simulator'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara hosts a five-round gaming contest between two teams that each feature a guest. Sara Cox and Daniel Sloss battle it out on games including `Wipeout', `FIFA 17' and `Crossy Road'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Dara and the others are joined by comedians Ellie Taylor and Jon Richardson for a five-round gaming contest. Along the way, Ellie and Jon battle it out on retro games including `Crash Team Racing' and `Aztec Challenge'.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Russell Howard and Rachel Riley pick up a control pad and lock horns on video games such as Sensible Soccer and Nidhogg. Think GamesMaster crossed with a panel show!

programme.title: Medium: There Will Be Blood...Type A
programme.desc: Allison and her daughters share the same dream of a strange girl who may be linked to a string of murders. Meanwhile, Joe has another disagreement with his boss.

programme.title: Medium: There Will Be Blood...Type B
programme.desc: Allison discovers that the strange girl from her and her daughters' dreams is the serial killer's next target, and she must protect the girl from danger while also trying to work with her to catch the killer.

programme.title: Medium: Sal
programme.desc: Allison installs a high-tech talking burglar alarm after a neighbor is murdered, which she later discovers might be communicating with Marie.

programme.title: Medium: Time Keeps On Slipping
programme.desc: Ariel somehow loses years of time in her life and must find a way to get back to the present.

programme.title: Medium: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Allison's friendship with a pig could lead to the whereabouts of a missing animal rights activist. Meanwhile, Joe gets a special birthday gift from Marie.

programme.title: Medium: It's A Wonderful Death
programme.desc: In the sixth season finale, Allison's brain tumor returns, which may prove to have major consequences for not only her, but her loved ones as well.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's New Job
programme.desc: When Janet lands a new job that actually pays, Gerald steps in to fill her shoes at the convenience store.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handyman
programme.desc: Mr. Kim fixes a toilet for Kimchee. Janet believes there is more to Edwin and Mrs. Kim's relationship.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's Lump
programme.desc: Mr. Kim's friend discovers a lump on Appa's back and he is reluctant to tell his family. Janet needs to attend an important ceremony, but the store has not been closed for twenty years.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Family Singing Contest
programme.desc: Mrs. Kim wants the family to sing at their church festival but really wants her son to sing with her instead of her daughter, whose voice in the past had left much to be desired.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Roommate
programme.desc: Jung worries his time to ask Shannon to go on a date is running out. Janet and Gerald are forced to put their apartment plans on hold.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Business Award
programme.desc: With a local business award up for grabs, Appa is feeling a little jumpy. Jung tries to get Shannon into cycling.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: House Guest
programme.desc: Umma invites Pastor Nina to move in while her apartment is renovated. Jung crashes Janet and Gerald's trivia night.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cardboard Jung
programme.desc: When Nayoung visits, a white lie leads to romantic chaos. Meanwhile, Umma brings a life-size cardboard cutout of Jung to the store.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Date Night
programme.desc: Janet urges her dad to step up his romance game during a date night with Umma. Jung stains Kimchee's collector sneakers and hunts to replace them.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Resting Place
programme.desc: While visiting their future burial plots, Appa and Umma make an unfortunate discovery. A faux fight between Jung and Kimchee is caught on video.

programme.title: JAG: Psychic Warrior
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG: Rouge
programme.desc: As the lowest ranking lawyer at JAG, Bud is assigned to accompany Raglan, a former Special Forces operative who is hired by the Pentagon to test security at military bases.

programme.title: JAG: Mishap
programme.desc: "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG: Into the Breach

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.desc: Cesar’s adventures in the UK continue with unstable dogs and the people who love them. You’ll meet a dog walker, littermates who no longer get along, and a couple who can’t get their dog in the car.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pasha, Cosmo, and Contessa
programme.desc: Pasha lashes out at people, especially children. Cosmo’s bitten several people including the postman. Contessa is highly aggressive towards TV shows, especially Dog Whisperer.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar’s Toughest Cases
programme.desc: This episode features several of Cesar's toughest cases including: a skateboard munching Bulldog, vicious Min-Pin and ferocious Chihuahua. Plus, updates on how the dogs are doing now.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Diego and Berkeley
programme.desc: An Argentinean hunting dog develops aggression towards other dogs. A rescued 2-year old terrier/corgi mix has a fear of traveling, specifically, the zippers of his doggie carrier.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Dead Man's Hollow: Nishan Bakunts
programme.desc: In 2002, an off-duty fireman discovered a body in a field charred beyond all recognition. All the police knew was that the man had died a brutal death, having been stabbed repeatedly, shot in the head, and drenched in petrol before being set alight.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.

programme.title: Killer Britain: Sabrina Kouider
programme.desc: Sabrina Kouider couldn’t have lived such a glamorous lifestyle without the help of Sophie Lionnet, the young French au pair who looked after her children. What Sophie didn’t know was that her employer was gripped by frenzied delusions and paranoia.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.233
programme.desc: A man faces a lawsuit for unpaid rent and property damage stemming from a Jacuzzi party, marijuana arrests, and roommate issues. Another man accuses his cousin of violence and property damage after refusing her late-night alcohol run request.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.228
programme.desc: Car salesman sues ex-girlfriend for default on used car sale; she countersues for illegal repossession. Woman's toddlers taken by children's services, blames ex; he and new girlfriend sue for unpaid loan and false allegations.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.48
programme.desc: Man accused of punching lover, sued for allegedly stealing bill money due to gambling habit/Woman uses inheritance to aid brother, demands repayment; he alleges false arrest and refuses payment.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.231
programme.desc: A brutal St. Patrick’s Day brawl between ex-lovers sparks a lawsuit. A woman initially denies identity theft accusations but prefers not to involve police in finding the 'real' culprit later.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.212
programme.desc: Ex-friends fight over charges on an allegedly stolen credit card. A man admits that he smashed his ex-girlfriend’s cell phone after reading her texts to another man and claims she is responsible for his belongings being stolen.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.120
programme.desc: A woman and her teen daughter accuse an estranged relative of assaulting them at a family party/A woman is suing her former friend for repossessing her truck; her friend argues that the vehicle was never insured.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.26
programme.desc: Intoxicated bride sues friend for face punch at wedding, accused teen claims self-defense/Woman accuses ex of cheating, he defends as moving on; dispute over living room set balance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.31
programme.desc: The emotional burial of a pet Chihuahua leads to a violent, bloody assault between family members/A woman sues her ex-fiancé for a loan to buy a home. He claims she wrecked his truck while driving drunk, so he’s not paying.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.181
programme.desc: Two 18-year-old girls accused of spray painting each other’s cars trace their alleged vandalism back to high school issues. A 'tickling' incident between young lovers causes a shoulder injury and a dispute over treatment costs.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.114
programme.desc: Man faces assault charges after altercation with son/Ex-fiancé sued for rent and unpaid loans.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.246
programme.desc: Racial slurs and violent threats emerge as a woman and her father sue a family member for incomplete home renovations. Meanwhile, friends swap cell phones, but a defective device complicates the arrangement.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Babysitter
programme.desc: Chris Routh, a responsible 14-year-old honor student loved children and earned money as a babysitter.. On July 25, 2001, Emily a child in his care suddenly stopped breathing. Was this a case of murder, an accident, or natural causes. Police investigate.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: In September 1999, Brian Eftenoff of Phoenix, Az. Was convicted of murdering his wife, Judi. It was alleged that Eftenoff forced more than a gram of cocaine down his wife’s throat causing her to die of a cocaine-induced stroke.

programme.title: 48 Hours: To Hell and Back
programme.desc: An interview with 17-year-old Jacque Marris who reveals new details about her abduction and how she and Tamara Brooks, another teenage victim, survived a harrowing 12-hour kidnapping on Aug. 1, 2002.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Hamptons
programme.desc: A report on the October 2001 murder of Wall Street tycoon Ted Ammon who was embroiled in a bitter divorce battle with his wife Generosa who later died of breast cancer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Terror at the Morgue
programme.desc: Dr. O.C. Smith, a medical examiner, was apparently attacked on June 1, 2002, as he was leaving work. He was found wrapped in barbed wire with a bomb strapped to his neck. Dr. Smith survived but expressed concern that his assailant might attack again

programme.title: 48 Hours: Where's Our Baby?
programme.desc: In November 1997, Marlene and Steve Aisenberg reported their five-month-old daughter Sabrina missing from her crib. Police soon focused on the parents as authorities became convinced that they knew more about the baby’s disappearance than they admitted.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chi-Town Showdown
programme.desc: Metal Victorian-era burial casket; 1870s glass fire extinguisher grenades; a mechanical 1896 handcrafted Chicago fire station alarm box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Ton and Allen hit the road for Nashville, where they rumble with a band of tough, high-bidding bikers. The day explodes when the guys discover a 37 millimeter anti-tank gun and a cowboy's rodeo saddle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gone in 20 Seconds
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get taken down by their fiercest opponent, CJ, but a twist of fate keeps the guys in the game. They uncover a Geiger counter and NASCAR impact wrenches, while their accountant delivers some shocking news.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro
programme.desc: Two fierce opponents best Ton and Allen at the auction, leaving the duo in the lurch with a "trash unit" and little chance of breaking even for the day. And Ton gets tazed.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter

programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: I Heard It Through The Morkvine
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mindy and Mork
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1935, Otto Rahn, a German writer, was tasked by Heinrich Himmler to find the Holy Grail. Himmler, despite his Nazi beliefs, envisioned displaying it in his castle, Wewelsberg, as his Camelot.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Book of Thoth, a legendary text of magic and wisdom, has inspired Freemasons, Tarot readers, and occultists across centuries. Yet, archaeologists doubt its existence despite its influence on esoteric culture from ancient Egypt to modern times.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Legend has it that in the Amazon jungle lies El Dorado, a mythical city of gold. Colonel Percy Fawcett, believed in its existence and spent years searching. In 1925, he vanished with his son and a friend during an expedition revealing a civilization.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1944 Italy, SS soldiers raid an Italian Count's villa under Himmler's orders to find the Germania, an ancient manuscript by Tacitus. Himmler idealized it as the "Book of Power" to prove Aryan superiority, justifying Nazi atrocities.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Ron Wyatt, a Nashville nurse turned amateur archaeologist at 47, aimed to validate Bible stories. In 1977, he claimed finding Noah’s Ark on Mount Ararat and later dived for Egyptian chariot remains, supporting Moses’ Red Sea crossing.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fin Del Mundo
programme.desc: Although he admits to not being much of a sailor, George climbs aboard a sailing vessel to explore the extreme southern tip of South America (Fin Del Mundo aka the "End of the World").

programme.title: Angry Planet: African Hellhole
programme.desc: George explores the deadly Nyiragongo volcano in the Congo jungle but the lava lake dwelling inside it's crater may be the least of his worries as he has to negotiate through armed conflict, a family of gorillas, and severe weather.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.desc: An Michigan officer in the northern Lower Peninsula works to confiscate guns that may have been used to illegally harvest elk and then have them analyzed by the lab of the State Police.

programme.title: Wardens: Frigid Fun
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol snowmobilers in the northern Lower Peninsula and officers in mid-Michigan check out "Tip Up Town" where ice fishing activity ramps up.

programme.title: Wardens: Firearm Deer Opener
programme.desc: Deer patrols on the firearm opener as well as later in the season by Michigan conservation officers.

programme.title: Wardens: Salmon Patrols and Field Trials
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers contact observe salmon anglers during the busy fall salmon spawning run. Also, segments on the Gladwin Field Trial Area and officers lend a hand in getting toys to underpriveleged children for Christmas.

programme.title: Wardens: Snowmobiles and Moose
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in districts 1 and 5 check out snowmobilers and ice anglers. Also, a look into trying to get an accurate moose count from a plane and conservation officers who help to gather toys for children for Christmas.

programme.title: Wardens: Fish and Turkeys
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol salmon fishermen, another CO shares his turkey hunting expertise with a hunter safety class, and a look into the DNR's efforts to place bands onto geese.

programme.title: Wardens: Trespassing for Deer
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers in the southern part of the state investigate a case of deer carcasses they found near some railroad tracks. Also, a look at an opportunity for veterans and first responders to hunt pheasants.

programme.title: Authentic Photographs of an Alien: The Caponi Case
programme.desc: Caponi's encounters with aliens from 1993. Real photos showcase extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Southwest China: China's Secret Garden
programme.desc: Tucked away in China's southwest corner is a hidden oasis unlike any other. Snow-capped mountains, temperate valleys and tropical jungles are home to a spectacular array of wildlife.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Windsor Revisit
programme.desc: About two years ago, first time buyers asked us to guide them. I've come back to see whether or not they lived happily.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from London, Buckinghamshire is the ideal location for two couples trying to combine high flying careers in the City, with the peace and quiet of small-town life for their young families.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: East Midlands
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back and busier than ever, as they attempt to find homes for two sets of house hunters with very different needs in an extremely challenging market.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Liverpool
programme.desc: Will Phil be the knight in shining armour to rescue these damsels in distress, and will Kirstie turn out to be Kate's property fairy godmother? Will they fail in their quest or find property success in Liverpool South?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tyne Valley
programme.desc: After a lot of hard saving, it's time for first time buyer fiancés', Kerry Ellis and Michael Byrne, to get on the property ladder.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: Morning newscast covering the day's top stories with context and depth, featuring live breaking news coverage and original reporting from correspondents around the globe.

programme.title: CBS Mornings
programme.desc: Reporting on international news stories, interviews, and in-depth pieces, covering topics from news, sports, climate and technology to race, health, parenting and personal finance.

programme.title: CBS Mornings Plus
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings Plus" is produced by the award-winning "CBS Mornings" team and takes viewers deeper into the most important headlines of the day, as well as pop culture, entertainment, health, wellness and financial news.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One
programme.desc: Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Loses His Marbles/Friday The 13th
programme.desc: When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Pet Business/D.W. The Copycat
programme.desc: How can Arthur prove to his parents that he's responsible enough to take care of his very own puppy? "Get a job," suggests D.W.!. Yet another personality change for D.W., who's decided that from now on, she'll be just like Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Do You Speak George?/World Girls
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie
programme.desc: When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Tough Customer/Brain's Chess Mess
programme.desc: The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A-Counting We Will Go!
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns a lesson about bragging when, playing superhero CAPTAIN PICKLES, he tells everyone that he can leap over the moon!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prepare for Departure
programme.desc: Grimlock goofs off while on monitor duty and misses a signal alert at the Nuclear Waste Disposal site. The Bee Team still gets there in time to engage Steeljaw and his Pack, but are waylaid in a crevasse and the Decepticons get away with nuclear material.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prisoner Principles
programme.desc: When the BEE TEAM investigates a Decepticon signal near a nuclear power plant, they find QUILLFIRE and CLAMPDOWN. Quillfire escapes, but STRONGARM captures Clampdown. He reveals STEELJAW's plan to steal nuclear fuel rods from the power plant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Optimus Prime arrives to warn the Bee Team about a breach in the Shadow Zone.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Something He Ate
programme.desc: The Bee Teamers return to the Scrapyard with their Decepticon captives, and find the place completely trashed. Sideswipe, Strongarm, and Grimlock balk at being assigned clean-up duty, asserting that they're warriors, not janitors.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sick as a Bot
programme.desc: The Autobots suffer serious malfunctions after the Decepticon WINGCODE exposes them to harmful nanoparticles in an attempt to get her claws on the team's stash of Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Five Fugitives
programme.desc: The Bee Team is about to catch their nemesis Steeljaw when they are interrupted by Strongarm's old mentor DROPFORGE, who arrives from Cybertron with orders to arrest them.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Enemy of my Enemy
programme.desc: Unannounced, Optimus returns to the scrapyard with an All-Star team of Autobot allies: Ratchet, Windblade, and Jazz, as well as Drift and his Mini-Cons.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Freedom Fighters
programme.desc: Surrounded and outgunned on Cybertron, the Bee Team and Steeljaw are in danger of seeing their mission to overthrow the oppressive High Council go up in smoke.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 1
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit. With the all powerful Allspark, Megatron can use it to turn all of Earth's robots into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 2
programme.desc: While working on a space bridge, the Autobots and their leader, Optimus Prime, find the AllSpark. After an epic battle between their ship and Megatron, they crash land on Earth in the city of Detroit.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 3
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots continue to fight off Megatron and the evil Decepticons. Eventually, the team assumes heroic roles in Detroit City.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Adam & Lara
programme.desc: With a growing brood of rescue dogs, fiancées Adam and Lara need a bigger property. And with their wedding just months away, the couple is hoping to find—and renovate—their forever home before they tie the knot.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Terin & Bryan
programme.desc: After moving from city to city to grow their businesses, Terin and Bryan are finally settling down in Vegas. Terin’s mom is graciously hosting them until they find the property of their dreams, but three’s a crowd.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Karina & Sam
programme.desc: Juggling house hunting and child rearing, Karina and Sam are desperate to get out of their rental close to the noisy Vegas Strip. And the Property Brothers are stepping in to find them a flawless family home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Del & Jen
programme.desc: After losing everything in a devastating house fire, soon-to-be empty nesters Del and Jen are back in her hometown of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Unidentified Flying Leonardo

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Once Upon a Time Machine

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa sit down to eat some Tubby Custard. Po wants some too. She tries to eat the other's Tubby Custard, but they won't let her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies love to play peek-a-boo. Then the Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady when she tells the story of the Naughty Sock. Dipsy can't sleep when the other Teletubbies are too noisy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children spin around on a carousel. In Teletubbyland a voice trumpet rises and the Teletubbies dance round and round the controls.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and a group of children see Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the naughty snake.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number four. They have fun singing a song of four before it's time for Tubby Bye-Bye.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky & Po burst out of the house to say Eh-oh and enjoy a big hug. Then they do it again. They join Dipsy & Laa-Laa to watch a little girl read the story of Jack & The Beanstalk.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children have fun riding their trikes. Po is riding her scooter and the other Teletubbies want to have a go.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po & Laa-Laa burst out of the house for a Big Hug and then watch a group of children act out their story of a journey. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa wondered where Po was so they went to look. Laa-Laa finds Po lying asleep under a big tree.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up and run off to watch some children tell a story with their drawings. Laa-Laa goes for a walk and as she walks she sings a song about what she sees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building a bunkhouse for Farmer Pickles guests The Pickers! Micky, Vicky and Little Ricky are helping with the sunflower harvest. The cabin is to be made of logs so Lofty’s job is very important today, lifting and laying the logs.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: When Scrambler tells Spud that Bob is putting together the machinery for Farmer Pickles’ sunflower oil factory, he decides that putting things together is something he’d be very good at. So he heads off to the factory to lend a hand.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Sabatini has decided to move from Bobsville to set up the Sunflower Valley bakery. Bob and the team are going to build him a new house close to the river. Muck asks if Spud can tag along as he’s been telling him exciting stories.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An old Willow tree has toppled over and needs to be chopped down. Lofty and Bob are going to make it safe and use the wood for other things. Meanwhile Travis and Sumsy wonder why they haven’t got a shelter of their own like Bob’s machines.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Its early morning in Sunflower Valley and Benny arrives bursting with enthusiasm. He’s not needed in Bobsville today and he’s come to the Valley to help. Today, the team are building Mr and Mrs Bentley’s special new house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Built to be Wild
programme.desc: Yeeee-haaw! Its hoedowns and showdowns for Bob the Builder and his machine team as they hit the trail to the Wild West for their fourth feature length adventure - BUILT TO BE WILD!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has volunteered to look after the farm whilst Farmer Pickles takes Humpty to a pig show. Bob arrives with Lofty at the crack of dawn whilst Wendy is due later to repair the roof on the barn.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a pavilion in the park to celebrate the annual flower show. Molly has built a special statue of a horse for the occasion which is to be unveiled at the opening ceremony.

programme.title: Homes and Playgrounds
programme.desc: Join Bob and his “Can-Do” crew as they go back on site to show you the exciting real world of big machines! From bird’s nests to houses, we all need a home and in this brand new adventure Bob explains how they are built.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Travis is delighted to receive his own Talkie Talkie and can’t wait to make good use of it. Mr Beasley arrives in the valley with a load of yoghurt pots as he heard something on the radio about making them into a house.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and Dizzy have spent the night at Bob’s old yard in Bobsville to help Wendy with some digging and mixing. The machines all wish that Wendy could come and live out in Sunflower Valley.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the team are finishing refurbishing the old watermill ready to begin milling the first Sunflower Valley flour. Work is just about to start when Dizzy hears a squeaking noise coming from above. There are bats in the old mill!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the fourth leg of their road trip, Thomas Plant has a brush with showbiz and Philip Serrell takes a fancy to some gym equipment.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Philip Serrell and Thomas Plant make some unlikely purchases on their last road trip and face a nail-biting finale at auction in Greenwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new road trip as savvy antiques aficionados Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw pit their expertise against each other on their journey from Lancashire to Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw buys some nightmarish figures and Mark Stacey goes retro as the boys travel across the country in style on the second leg of their trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the third leg of their road trip, Mark Stacey and Paul Laidlaw start their shopping in Stafford and finish with a nail-biting auction in Nantwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw gets a peek into the life of the royals and Mark Stacey learns about Pomp and Circumstance on the fourth leg of their road trip.

programme.desc: Top talents from women's darts pair up to compete for the doubles crown, featuring Lisa Ashton & Gemma Hayter.

programme.title: Darts
programme.desc: Group C Day Two, International Pairs 2.

programme.title: Bullseye Only Challenge: Match Edition
programme.desc: 24/7 Darts! Including live coverage of the Pluto TV MODUS Super Series tournament, six days a week, 50 weeks a year. Plus plenty of exclusive darts content, with news, views and interviews with the biggest names and personalities on and off the oche!

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Starfyre Fugitive, Mother/Son Murder, Fatima (Pts. 1& 2), Update: Lucky Lost Love and Lady Killer.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: San Marino Bones & UD, Phantom Sub, Police Captain's Death, UD: Baby Girl X and School Bus Family & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Padre Pio, Pts. 1 & 2, Model's Third Notebook & UD, Calculating Coroners & UD and Nazi's Lazarus.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Furniture Store Shoot Out, Comedy Store Ghosts, Gypsy Fraud, Shopping Mall Pen Pal and Update: Thank You Phillip.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visit Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Poltergeist Nightmare at 30 East Drive
programme.desc: The team step into a house that has become a legend with the paranormal community, 30 East Drive, Pontefract.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 1
programme.desc: The team heads to Lincolnshire to investigate the Village Farm Museum. This location looks out of place, being in the middle of a residential housing estate.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Sinister Happenings at The Village Farm Museum Part 2
programme.desc: This fascinating location sees a twist in the activity with Bex and Sean getting more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Souls Seeking Solace Gotts Park Mansion
programme.desc: The team encounters a spirit member joining them on the thermal imaging camera and appearing to leave its ghostly hand print behind.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of Aces
programme.desc: Garth Doull trained to be a policeman but the lure of the race track saw him swap sides of the law to become a consummate con-man. On the 8th of September 1989, his body was found floating in Wellington harbour.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Stone Cold
programme.desc: In 2004, Brendan Percy was found dead of hypothermia and dehydration in a sub alpine area above Oamaru in suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: City Hell
programme.desc: Onthis episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is hauntingthe building.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frighternity
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to investigate the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery...and his ghost still roams the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Ghost of a Marine
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Family of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted By Heroes
programme.desc: For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Firehouse
programme.desc: Everyone from the chief to the trainees at the Clementon Fire Department is convinced that the ghost of a former member is haunting their firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Woman in the Window
programme.desc: Ryan and his team lend paranormal assistance to a family who lives in a historic home that was once a part of the Underground Railroad. Does the answer to their haunting lie in the mysterious tunnels beneath the house?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board
programme.desc: The owners of a vacation lodge in the remote town of North Hudson, NY, feel their woodsy getaway is plagued by negative spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil in Jersey
programme.desc: PRS delves deep into the pine barrens of the Garden State to separate myth from reality about the so-called "Jersey Devil." Accompanied by a cryptozoologist the team interviews eye witnesses and experts in search of the truth.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shape Shifter
programme.desc: PRS travels to Shapleigh, Maine where a woman and her daughter are reporting attacks from a winged creature with sharp teeth. Psychic Chip Coffey arrives and senses a half-human, half animal presence.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Sex Dungeon
programme.desc: Psychic/Medium Chip Coffey and Chad Calek join PRS for this unusual case of a sprawling mansion on Greyhaven Island near Detroit. Ken, the owner, hears voices and banging and it has him feeling both watched and cursed; a prisoner in his own home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Smoke and Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah believes her Parkville, MD home has been invaded by a powerful force ever since her roommate Dennis moved in. PRS investigates claims that Dennis has been attacked by the entity, a possible poltergeist.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P2
programme.desc: Stuart enters the underbelly of this remarkable building and starts to witness some very strange occurrences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Armely Mills Cottage
programme.desc: The cottage on the site of Armley Mills is said to be full of paranormal activity so Karl decides to enter, alone and witnesses something that is eager to grab his attention.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Shrewsbury Prison
programme.desc: Abandoned prisons are always a daunting prospect and the Most Haunted team love them. This time Karl takes on HMP Shrewsbury alone and experiences some of the unhappy phantoms that lurk in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P1
programme.desc: With a history dating back to 1185, Salmesbury Hall is of the UK’s most historic buildings and said to be one of the most haunted. With ghost stories and sightings all over the building, Stuart investigates the ground floor.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Samlesbury Hall P2
programme.desc: Karl investigates the upper floors of this historic building dating back to 1185, and realises he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the very haunted school room in the large imposing Gressenhall Workhouse. The activity starts even before Karl gets into the building and becomes one of the most impressive investigations to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Gressenhall Workhouse Pt2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates two buildings, a forge and the cottage. He could not have imagined the activity that unfolded around him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall P1
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house and seems to be pulled in different directions from an unexplained energy.

programme.title: A Haunting: Heartland Horror
programme.desc: Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunted Cabinet
programme.desc: After James Hilton and his girlfriend Sandy bring an antique cabinet into their home, they capture actual video evidence proving it’s haunted. Sandy fears the entity from the cabinet is taking James over and turns to paranormal investigators for aid.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a nice summer's day Bear, as usual, goes fishing and Masha follows alongside. But the fishing trip didn't quite work out: the forest dwellers made a beach at Bear's favourite spot. Masha is glad to have the opportunity to swim.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Big Momma's House

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: Banana Joe: Banana Joe
programme.desc: A man is living happily on an island with his family, growing bananas. When a local mobster with an eye on man's property tries to take it from him, he must go to the town for the first time to get some help.

programme.desc: In a quest to find a lost colleague, a team of scientists find themselves deep underground in an ancient labyrinth, while trying to unearth a secret that has been buried for centuries.

programme.title: Strange But True
programme.desc: Five years after the tragic death of her boyfriend, a woman arrives on the doorstep of his family claiming she is pregnant with his child.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended

programme.desc: The team investigate two seemingly unrelated deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac has a choice to make as he lies in limbo between life and death.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the murder of a wealthy racehorse owner.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A murder suspect tries to throw the CSIs off his trail.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Greg Parker immediately faces suspension from the team after keeping the relationship between two team members a secret.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A fire captain who feels nothing he does is good enough is given the chance to prove to himself and to an injured member of his crew that he can set things right.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is looking for an armed and abusive man who has tracked down his ex-wife demanding to know where their daughter, who is celebrating her 18th birthday, is.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One has to rescue a doctor, but as they search Sam discovers a child in critical need of medical attention, and realizes that being taken hostage may be the only way to save him.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One believes they are stopping a robbery in progress unaware that part of the robbers' plan is to escape their cruel leader. Their plan could make them his next victims and the team has to try to keep the robbers from harm.

programme.title: Percy Vs Goliath
